title: Ice and Fire: Curios and Trinkets
description: Adds a unique selection of Ice and Fire curios and equipment using Curio API
body:
# Ice and Fire: Curios and Trinkets
##**_ Requires CURIO API and ICE AND FIRE: DRAGONS to work!_**
## Highly Recommended to use JEI to view recipes!

This mod adds a variety of curios and equipables using Ice and Fire materials, each themed after Ice and Fire entities or gameplay mechanics.

Every item is craftable, and provides balanced upgrades and effects.

 

## List of Equipment:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Update Stage 1:
### Deathworm Knuckles

- Cripples targets.
### 
### Amphithere Anklet

- Knocks back targets.

### Dragon Heart

- Huge stat increases.
### 
### Eyeball Locket

- Applies weakness to nearby enemies.

### Sand Stalkers

- Grants invisibility and extra speed on sand.

### Shiny Fins

- Grants increased swim speed.

### Tide Necklace

- Grants increased swim speed, water breathing, and stat increases.


### Troll Leather Coat

- Grants knockback resistance and passive thorns.
### 
### Stymphalian Feather Belt

- Shoots Stymphalian feathers around the wearer when attacked.

Update Stage 2:
### Gold Amulet

- Basic HP increase.
### 
### Silver Amulet

- Basic speed increase.

### Copper Amulet

- Basic attack speed increase.

### Infused Gold Amulet

-Immunity to and healing from fire.

### Infused Silver Amulet

-Immunity to slowing effects and gives buffs while cold.

### Infused Copper Amulet

-Immunity to lightning, and gives buffs when struck by lightning.

### Flame Treaders

-Leaves a flaming trail behind the user if they're not sneaking.

### Frost Treaders

-Leaves slowing ice trail behind the user if they're not sneaking.

### Thunder Treaders

-Leaves a damaging energy trail behind the user if they're not sneaking.

Update Stage 3:
### Ring of Festering

- Feeds user on every kill.

### Ring of Emaciation

- The less health the opponent has, the more damage inflicted.

### Ring of Bartering

- Lessens villager trade costs.

### Ring of Withering

- Immunity to withering and chance to apply withering on attacks.

### Phantasmal Boots

- Immunity to fall damage and gives a Dash Move.

### Bleeding Heart of Stone

- Gives immunity to projectiles, poison, and withering effects.

### Hydra Fangs

- Applies poison to opponents.

### Ferocious Knuckles

- Cripples and poisons target.

 Update Stage 3.5:

### Dreaded Candle

- Applies the "Dread" buff, night vision, and saves the wearer from death occasionally.

### Torn Dreadbanner

- When activated, applies the "War Song" buff, raising speed, strength, and resistance.

</details>



More content will be added in the future, along with cosmetics of all equipment!

This mod is NOT endorsed nor created by the original Ice and Fire: Dragons authors, and is a standalone use of the mod through crafting recipes and designs.

 

If you have questions, comments, concerns, or ideas, contact me at:

Discord: somekoifee
